data.title: Ventura County-Based Commercial Landscape Leader, Goldenstate Landscapes, Joins the Greater Conejo Valley Chamber of Commerce
data.description: Goldenstate Landscapes has recently broadened its business-to-business involvement in Thousand Oaks, Westlake Village, Agoura Hills, and nearby areas through collaboration with the Chamber of Commerce in CAMARILLO, Calif. This expansion, initiated on March 25, 2026, elevates Goldenstate Landscapes' standing as a premier commercial landscaping service provider in Ventura.

data.title: Basketball Star, Rapper and Philanthropist, Flau'jae Johnson, and e.l.f. Cosmetics Create New Moves Together to Inspire the Next Generation
data.description: e.l.f. Cosmetics, a brand under e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE: ELF), has revealed a new year-long collaboration with Flau’jae Johnson, renowned basketball player, musician, and founder of More to 4 Foundation. Johnson is the latest addition to e.l.f.'s empowered.legendary.females lineup, joining notable figures such as Billie Jean King, Kendall Coyne Schofield, Katherine Legge, Ally Sentnor, Jaedyn Shaw, Jess Carter, and Lo’eau LaBonta. These individuals are united in their dedication to promoting positivity and inclusivity.
20-year JGB yield drops 2.5 bps to 3.110%.

data.title: Chai AI Research, 5,000+ GPU Cluster and Regulatory Compliance
data.description: In Palo Alto, California on March 25, 2026, Chai AI revealed the implementation of a specialized cluster of over 5,000 GPUs to enhance its post-training exploration. The primary emphasis is on advancing research in large-scale model alignment and safety measures. This significant investment in infrastructure signifies a strategic shift towards prioritizing "Safe Scaling" within the organization.

data.title: SAFE Structure Designs Delivers Custom Aviation Maintenance Tooling for U.S. Army's CH-47 Chinook Block II Fleet
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in Las Vegas, American defense engineering and manufacturing company SAFE Structure Designs revealed the completion and shipment of a specialized aviation maintenance tool. This tool was custom-made to support critical military operations. The company is known for its expertise in creating mission-critical equipment to aid military functions.

data.title: Bitcoin Depot's CEO leaves as crypto ATM crackdown intensifies. Regulatory challenges impact core kiosk operations.
data.description: The crypto ATM operator has undergone a sudden change in leadership due to the impact of regulatory oversight on its core kiosk business.

data.title: ZNSHINE SOLAR Supplies Modules for Cherry Valley I PV Project in the United States
data.description: A leading photovoltaic manufacturer, ZNSHINE SOLAR, recently disclosed its involvement in the Cherry Valley I PV Project located in Cherry Valley, Arkansas. The company has committed to supplying 155.735 MW of top-quality modules to this project, which has a total capacity of 185.035 MW (DC). This initiative highlights ZNSHINE SOLAR's significant contribution to the renewable energy sector and showcases its position as a Tier 1 player in the global industry.

data.title: Purple Innovation Extends Maturity of Debt and Reschedules Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, on March 24, 2026, Purple Innovation, Inc. (NASDAQ: PRPL), a leading comfort innovation firm known for its mattresses aiming to provide "less pain, better sleep," revealed the extension of its debt maturity from December 31, 2026, to April 30, 2027.

data.title: OpenAI discontinues AI video app Sora after 6 months; CEO Sam Altman announces shutdown of text-to-video models, Disney's $1B investment axed.
data.description: According to reports, the CEO of OpenAI, Sam Altman, has announced that all of the organization's text-to-video models will be shut down. Additionally, a significant $1 billion investment from Disney has been called off as well.
